method: Ran the four gate commands sequentially against a clean `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, in the same sandcastle sandbox environment (node v22.23.1, pnpm 8.15.9) the implement/review runners use, timing each command individually with wall-clock before/after timestamps. Reproduce: `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, then time `eslint .`, `pnpm run typecheck`, `vitest run`, `pnpm -r run build` in that order on a quiescent runner (no concurrent load).

gateSpeed.description: CI wall-clock time for the gate the dumb zone (.sandcastle/) runs before opening a PR.

ciWorkflowReference.note: Cross-check data point only, NOT the primary number: .github/workflows/ci.yml runs a narrower shape (lint soft-gated with continue-on-error, no dedicated typecheck step, build+test) on a GitHub-hosted ubuntu-latest runner. The sandcastle gate above (eslint/typecheck/vitest/build) is the shape this baseline tracks.

gatePerformance.description: Runner cost & resource efficiency, independent of wall-clock.

runnerMinutesBillable.note: Per the GitHub Actions run-timing API (`GET /repos/.../actions/runs/{id}/timing`) for run 29953900516, `billable.UBUNTU.total_ms` is 0 — the org runs on free/unlimited GitHub-hosted minutes, so billable runner-minutes is not a meaningful cost signal here. Wall-clock (gateSpeed) is the actionable metric instead.

dockerImageSize.note: Not measured in this capture pass — no Docker daemon is available in the capture sandbox. Reproduce in an environment with Docker: `npx --yes @ai-hero/sandcastle@0.12.0 docker build-image && docker image inspect sandcastle:swap --format '{{.Size}}'`.

cacheHitRate.sample: pnpm dependency cache (actions/setup-node@v4, cache: pnpm) across the last 5 completed CI runs on main
cacheHitRate.missNote: The one miss (run 29935890668, 'Cache not found for input keys' -> 'pnpm cache is not found') immediately followed a pnpm-lock.yaml change (new @ai-hero/sandcastle devDependency in #70) — an expected cache-key invalidation, not a regression.

gateCorrectness.description: Trustworthiness of the gate's verdict: current violation counts, frozen here as the pre-ratchet baseline (no false PASS still holds — every violation below was already surfaced by the gate, none is newly hidden).

typecheck.note: All 42 errors are test-side (packages/swap/src/*.test.ts and packages/swap/tests/**); zero production-source (non-test src/*.ts) errors. Tracked debt: swap#69 (opened at 60 errors; down to 42 after swap#74's TS2532 fix slice).
